data.title: 国际服未花专辑「Memories in Melody」上线
data.summary: [‘Memories in Melody’ Mika Edition Digital Release!] Sensei, the ‘Memories in Melody’ Mika edition d
data.body:
[‘Memories in Melody’ Mika Edition Digital Release!]

Sensei, the ‘Memories in Melody’ Mika edition digital soundtrack is now available!

Relive the shimmering memories of that moonlit Christmas night through Mika’s heartfelt melodies 🎵
You can also enjoy her mini musical on the official YouTube channel—thank you again for all your love and support!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3359499

#BlueArchive
